Class-Paladin 20 — Male Human Paladin: 20
Strength: 11 (+0) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 16 (+3) Intelligence: 12 (+1) Wisdom: 10 (+0) Charisma: 15 (+2)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Good Deity: Greyhawk-Ralishaz
Experience: 807932/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 165/330
Ability Notes: Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Paladin (Fighting Style); Paladin (Sacred Oath)
Feats: Dual Wielder; Elemental Adept (Acid); Magic Initiate (Sorcerer); Spell Sniper; Tough Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Paladin Features: Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Aura Of Courage; Aura Of Protection; Champion Challenge; Channel Divinity; Cleansing Touch; Divine Allegiance; Divine Health; Divine Sense; Divine Smite; Exalted Champion; Extra Attack; Fighting Style (Dueling); Fighting Style; Improved Divine Smite; Lay On Hands; Oath Of The Crown Spells; Oath Of The Crown; Sacred Oath; Save Proficiency (Wisdom; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Athletics, Insight, Intimidation, Medicine, Persuasion, Religion); Spellcasting (Paladin); Turn The Tide; Unyielding Spirit; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Acolyte Features: Language (Choose 2 from any); Shelter Of The Faithful; Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion)
Feature Notes:
Fighting Style: 1 selection
Sacred Oath: 1 selection
Shelter Of The Faithful: Can receive aid from temples of Greyhawk-Ralishaz and fellow believers
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +2 Insight: (wis) +6 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +0 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +8
Arcana: (int) +1 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +7
Athletics: (str) +0 Medicine: (wis) +0 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +1 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +1 Perception: (wis) +0 Survival: (wis) +0
Skill Proficiency: Insight; Persuasion; Religion
Languages: Common; Giant; Halfling; Undercommon
Skill Notes:
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Divine Sense: R60' Can discern the location of celestials, fiends, undead, consecration, and desecration until the end of the next turn 3 times per long rest
Combat
Hit Points: 164 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 18
Armor Proficiency: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Plate Shield: None Weapons: Glaive (+6 1d10 S); Longbow (+8 1d8+2 P R150/600); Morningstar (+6 1d8 P); Unarmed Strike (+6 1 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +60
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Tough: +40 Hit Points
Champion Challenge: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to force targets to stay within 30' (save DC 16 Wisdom negates)
Divine Allegiance: Can use a reaction to shift damage inflicted on an adjacent creature onto self
Divine Smite: Can expend a spell slot after a successful melee attack to inflict 1d8 HP radiant plus 1d8 HP per slot level, up to a maximum of 5d8 HP; undead and fiends suffer an additional 1d8 HP
Dual Wielder: +1 Armor Class when wielding two melee weapons/Can use two-weapon fighting with any one-handed weapons/Can draw or stow two one-handed weapons simultaneously
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Fighting Style (Dueling): Inflicts +2 HP with a single, one-handed melee weapon
Improved Divine Smite: Melee attacks inflict +1d8 HP radiant
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +10; Constitution: +5; Dexterity: +4; Intelligence: +3; Strength: +2; Wisdom: +8
Save Notes:
Aura Of Protection: +2 on all saves
Aura Of Courage: R30' Self and allies have immunity to frightened
Aura Of Protection: R30' Allies have +2 on all saves
Divine Health: Has immunity to disease
Exalted Champion: Can use an action to gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical weapons, and to give self and allies advantage on Wisdom saves and saves vs. death, for 1 hr once per long rest
Unyielding Spirit: Has advantage vs. paralyzed and stunned
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: P: 12; S0: 2; S: 1 Spell Slots: P1: 4; P2: 3; P3: 3; P4: 3; P5: 2 Attack: P: +8; S: +8 Spell DC: P: 16; S: 16
Spells:
Aura Of Purity (P4 Abju): (Action) 30' radius gives nonhostile creatures resistance to poison damage, immunity to disease, and advantage on saves vs. conditions for concentration up to 10 min
Aura Of Vitality (P3 Evoc): (Action) R30' Self can use a bonus action to restore 2d6 hit points to a target once per turn for concentration up to 1 min
Aura Of Vitality (P3 [Oath Of The Crown Spells] Evoc): (Action) R30' Self can use a bonus action to restore 2d6 hit points to a target once per turn for concentration up to 1 min
Banishing Smite (P5 Abju): (Bonus) Next successful weapon attack within concentration up to 1 min inflicts +5d10 HP force, plus banishment until the spell ends to the target's home plane or a demiplane if the attack reduces the target below 51 hit points
Banishment (P4 [Oath Of The Crown Spells] Abju): (Action) R60' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; extraplanar creatures don't return if the spell is maintained for a full min (+Level affects +1 target)
Branding Smite (P2 Evoc): (Bonus) Next successful weapon attack within concentration up to 1 min inflicts +2d6 HP radiant and causes the target to emit a 5' dim light until the spell ends (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Charm Person (S1 Ench): (Action) R30' Target humanoid becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage) for 1 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target)
Circle Of Power (P5 [Oath Of The Crown Spells] Abju): (Action) Allies in a 30' radius have advantage on saves vs. magic, and successful saves vs. magic yield no damage instead of half, for concentration up to 10 min
Command (P1 [Oath Of The Crown Spells] Ench): (Action) R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self on its next turn (save Wisdom negates) (+Level affects +1 target)
Compelled Duel (P1 [Oath Of The Crown Spells] Ench): (Bonus) R30' Target stays within 30' of self (save Wisdom negates) and suffers disadvantage on attacks on others for concentration up to 1 min; self attacking another or a successful attack on the target by an ally ends
Cure Wounds (P1 Evoc): (Action) Touched regains 1d8+2 hit points (+Level restores +1d8 hit points)
Elemental Weapon (P3 Tran): (Action) Touched weapon gains +1 attack and +1d4 HP damage of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level gives +2 or +3 attack and +2d4 or +3d4 damage at level 5 or 7)
Find Steed (P2 Conj): (10 Minutes) R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in steed form; it has an Intelligence of at least 6, can understand at least 1 language, and can communicate telepathically with self for 1 mile
Fire Bolt (S0 Evoc): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d10 HP fire or ignites an unattended flammable target
Geas (P5 Ench): (Minute) R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) each day for 30 days (+Level extends the duration to 1 year or permanently at level 7 or 9)
Geas (P5 [Oath Of The Crown Spells] Ench): (Minute) R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) each day for 30 days (+Level extends the duration to 1 year or permanently at level 7 or 9)
Guardian Of Faith (P4 [Oath Of The Crown Spells] Conj): (Action) R30' 10' radius inflicts 20 HP radiant on foes (save Dexterity half) for 8 hr or until it has inflicted 60 HP
Heroism (P1 Ench): (Action) Willing touched gains immunity to frightened and 2 temporary hit points each rd for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Locate Creature (P4 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; running water blocks the spell
Locate Object (P2 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
Prestidigitation (S0 Tran): (Action) R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Purify Food And Drink (P1 Tran): (Action) R10' Removes poison and disease from nonmagical food and drink in a 5' radius [R]
Remove Curse (P3 Abju): (Action) Ends all curses affecting a touched creature or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Spirit Guardians (P3 [Oath Of The Crown Spells] Conj): (Action) 15' radius inflicts 3d8 HP necrotic or radiant (save Wisdom half) and half Speed on non-designated creatures for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Staggering Smite (P4 Evoc): (Bonus) Next successful melee weapon attack within concentration up to 1 min inflicts +4d6 HP psychic and disadvantage on attacks and ability checks and loss of reactions until the end of the target's next turn (save Wisdom negates disadvantage and loss of reactions)
Thunderous Smite (P1 Evoc): (Bonus) Next successful melee weapon attack within concentration up to 1 min inflicts +2d6 HP thunder, a 10' push, and knocked prone (save Strength negates push and prone)
Warding Bond (P2 [Oath Of The Crown Spells] Abju): (Action) Willing touched gains +1 Armor Class, +1 saves, and resistance to all damage, and any damage to the target also affects self, for 1 hr; separation by more than 60' or casting again ends
Zone Of Truth (P2 [Oath Of The Crown Spells] Ench): (Action) R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Magic Notes:
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect once per short rest
Cleansing Touch: Touch can end a spell effect on a willing creature 2 times per long rest
Elemental Adept (Acid): Spells that inflict acid damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Lay On Hands: Touch can heal 100 hit points per long rest; can use 5 hit points' worth to cure a disease or neutralize a poison
Magic Initiate (Sorcerer): Knows 2 Sorcerer cantrips and can cast a chosen S1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Spell Sniper: Ranged attack spells have double their normal range and ignore 3/4 cover/Knows an additional attack cantrip
Spellcasting (Paladin): Can cast spells from the paladin spell list; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Turn The Tide: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to restore 1d6+2 hit points to targets with fewer than half their maximum hit points
